holdings.infoBox: AVL is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings. The top holdings are Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 stock at 50.24%, Broadcom at 22.62%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 22.60%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 17.33%, and Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 5.88%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily AVGO Bull 2X ETF (AVL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Broadcom Inc. stock. AVL was launched on Oct 10, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
